flavor.description: Tiny public projects with very sincere committees.
Porches, fences, and well-meaning weekend projects.
Shops, studios, and coffee-powered deadlines.

flavor.fail_line: Community Push complicated things with polite efficiency.
flavor.headline: Neighborhood Volunteer Week
flavor.impact_line: Civic jobs pay better and feel steadier.
flavor.neutral_line: Community Push existed and the day adapted.
flavor.success_line: Community Push helped more than expected.

strings.assignmentHint: Accept one contract, then work it in half-hour chunks.
strings.continueIncompatible: Old save detected. This build needs a fresh run for the new job flow.
strings.continueMissing: No compatible save found. Time to found a tiny empire.
strings.crewDeferred: Crews are deferred during the phased-job refactor.
strings.neutralLogFallback: The work progressed at the speed of weather.
strings.noContracts: No contracts available for this board.
strings.quickBuyDescription: Use spare hours to quick buy missing tools before committing to the job.
strings.subtitle: You do the work. The work happens.
strings.title: Error Hammer
strings.titleNameHint: Both player and company names are required to start.
